title: The whiplash tariff and minor psychological injuries
body: "The Ministry of Justice introduced the whiplash tariff on 31 May 2021. It is a fixed tariff of compensation for road traffic accident (RTA) related whiplash injuries lasting up to 2 years.  This guidance sets out details on the application of the whiplash tariff for road traffic accident related personal injury claims and guidance on relevant minor psychological injuries. "
